global_description: A small, compact bird with a rounded body and short tail. It has a predominantly brown plumage with subtle streaks and a lighter underbelly. The wings are short and rounded, and the beak is thin and slightly curved.

part_details.plumage: Brown with fine streaks, providing a camouflaged appearance.
part_details.wings: Short, rounded, and brown, aiding in quick, agile flight.
part_details.beak: Thin, slightly curved, ideal for catching insects.
part_details.tail: Short and slightly rounded, aiding in balance.
part_details.underbelly: Lighter brown or buff, contrasting with the darker upper parts.

spatial_relations: The wings are attached to the sides of the rounded body.
The beak protrudes from the front of the head.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
